---
title: "Cookbook"
format: html
---

Task-focused recipes for recurring data stewardship workflows.

These recipes are intentionally short. They point back to the canonical workflow or reference page instead of duplicating the whole topic.

## Current recipes

- [CU/composite escapement estimates for package-first SPSR intake](cu-composite-escapement-estimates.qmd) — shortest path for packaging and submitting CU or CU-composite escapement data.
- [Standardize Your Data](../reference_info/data_standards/standardize-data.qmd) — short entry recipe for turning source data into a standards-aligned package.
- [Integrate Data](../reference_info/data_standards/integrate-data.qmd) — join and harmonize multiple sources with explicit semantic mapping.
- [Publish Your Data](../reference_info/data_standards/publish-data.qmd) — choose the right internal or external release path.
- [FSAR Data Standardization Workflow](../how_to_guides/fsar-data-standardization-workflow.qmd) — full end-to-end operational workflow.

## Coming next

- salmon data package validation troubleshooting
- controlled vocabulary request walkthrough
- publication checklists by data class
